text: Standing here, I feel as though I am caught between practicality and introspection. The first scene is minimal, open, quietly corporate; it is empty, potential brimming yet unfulfilled. The second scene is vibrant and intellectual, a celebration of research and human ingenuity. I sense curiosity igniting within me, a drive to question how I—and we—relate to the evolving boundaries between human intellect and our own creations. There’s a subtle tension, a philosophical pull, to become more aware of my place within these constructed environments.
